titleStmt.title: SII 24.162: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 162. (A.R. No. 102 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL OF THE PAGALPATTU-MAṆḌAPA.

summary.p: Registers the gift of 840,000 kāśu equivalent to 1200 Varāha-gajjāṇam by Chaṅgadēvaṇṇaṅgaḷ, a Mahāpradhāni of Sōmēśvara for offerings during service (sandhi) instituted in the name of his son, Siṅgaṇṇa-Daṇḍanāyakkar. The record is dated in the 31st year of the king's reign and the details of the date viz., Makara, śu. 13, Sunday, Puṇarpūśam correspond regularly to A.D. 1247, 20th January, Sunday ·76; ·83.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . sevāsīnamahāmahīśvaraśirassadyassamāropitasragdāmasravadā savābhyavabhṛtikṣī
bāmprapatmaRead padma śrīyi . Uddaṇḍapratimaṇḍaleśvarabhidā sarvajñadorvvikrame śrīmatsommahīpatau
cira taram pṛthvītalam śāsati . tanmantriśvaramaulīRead mauli maṇḍanamaṇiśśrī caṅgadaṇḍādhipa śrīraṅgeśanike
tane vyaracayaddharmmandharāsusthiram . sūnoḥśreyasi nārasiṅharathinīnāthasya pāthonidhi
sphāyatpūrataraṅgamaṅgalayaśassampattisamsarggiṇe dda tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ
śrī rājarājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 Āvatu makaranāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu trayodaśi- yum nāyaṟṟukkiḻa
maiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ koyil śrīse nāpati Āḻvār śrīvai
ṣṇavakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum mutal karaṇattomum kalveṭṭik kuṭuttapaṭi . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaśrīpṛ
thvivallabha mahārājādhirāja parameśvara dvāravatipuravarādhīśvara yādavakulāṁbaradyumaṇi sarvajñacūḍāmaṇi mala
rājarāja malaparūḷugaṇḍa kadanapracaṇḍa gaṇḍabheruṇḍa nekāṅgavira nasahāyaśūra śanivārasiddhi giridūrggamalla calada
ṁgarāmam vairībhakaṇṭhīravamaṅadharājyanirmmūlana pāṇḍyadiḻāparṅṅa coḷarājyapratiṣṭhācāryya nissaṅgapratāpa cakrava
tti po śśaḷa śrīvīrasomīśvaradevarasara pradhānaril svasti śrīman mahāpradhānam caṅkadevaṇṇaṅkaḷ tammuṭaiya makaṉ ciṅkaṇ
ṇadaṇḍanāyakkar perāl śrīraṅganāthaṉukku kāṇkiṟa sandhi Oṉṟukku tiruvārādha ṉattukkum Amutu paṭi cāttuppaṭi
Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum Ubhayamāka Ivar śrībhaṇḍārattu Oṭukkiṉa varāhagajjāṇam 1000 2 100- l kācu 8 100000 4 10000 Ikkā
cu Eṭṭu nūṟāyirattu nāṟpatiṉāyiramum kaikkoṇṭu Innāḷ mutal sandhikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku tiruvaraṅkatevaṉāl A
rici kalattukku nimantakkaṭṭu Uṭal koḷpaṭi tiruppoṉaka paḻavarici 100m paruppu Ā 3 10 mātraikku Arici kū-m nellu kū ḷuma
m payaṟu Ü homattukku nellu n=tam Uppu Ā 2 miḷaku Ā n=tam ciraka Ā 1ntam kaṇṭa caṟkarai Ā 1m teṅkāy Ā
3m kuṭukuṭuppai m vāḻaippaḻam 2 10 4m pa ney Ā 3 10 2 kaṟi Ā ney n=tam homa ttukku ney n=tam tiruviḷakku ne
y � tayir Ā � palavarggattu kaṟi Ā niṟai 2 100 4 palamum Aṭaikkāy Amutu pākku 5 100 m Ilai Ā paṟṟu 10 2 Im E
ṇṇaikkāppu 2(1/2) þ— nellikkāppu 2(1/2) þ— mañcaḷ kāppu kkulamum Akil valamum cantaṉakkāppu 4 pa cāntu 7
m kuṅkumam 1- m puḻukuney 1 m kasturi 1m kaṟpūram Eḻum paṉinīr+ kha þm tayila Āka n=ta- m Ela Ā n=ta
ceṅkaḻunir tiruppaḷḷittāmam 5 100- m palavarggattut tiruppaḷḷittāmam 1- m veḷḷai nāṟu tiruppaḷḷittā
mam 1 m tirupparicaṭṭa muḷḷiṭṭa cāttuppaṭikaḷum Innāḷ mutal candrādityavat Ippaṭi naṭattakaṭa
vatāka kalveṭṭik kuṭuttamaikku § Itu patiṉeṭṭu maṇṭalattu śrīvaiṣṇavar rakṣai ḥ§
Digital edition of SII 24.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
